name: Etsy sellers processing 10–50 orders/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 10–50 orders/month, stockouts cause late orders. We provide automated alerts instead of manual tracking.
problem_solved: Inability to efficiently track stock levels and reorder supplies in a timely manner.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inability to efficiently track stock levels and reorder supplies in a timely manner.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Etsy sellers processing 10–50 orders/month, stockouts cause late orders. We provide automated alerts instead of manual tracking.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual tracking using spreadsheets or basic inventory apps.

one_liner: For Etsy sellers processing 10–50 orders/month, stockouts cause late orders. We provide automated alerts instead of manual tracking.
